101-133:headlessUncompress.signature: headlessUncompress( int[] in,  IntWrapper inpos,  int inlength,  int[] out,  IntWrapper outpos,  int num)
translation: def headlessUncompress(self, in_: object, inpos: object, inlength: object, out: object, outpos: object, num: object) -> None:
for _ in range(s + self.BLOCK_SIZE * 4 - 1, outpos.get() + outlength):
BitPacking.fastunpack(in_, tmpinpos, out, s + self.BLOCK_SIZE, mbits2)
BitPacking.fastunpack(in_, tmpinpos, out, s + 2 * self.BLOCK_SIZE, mbits3)
BitPacking.fastunpack(in_, tmpinpos, out, s + 3 * self.BLOCK_SIZE, mbits4)
